summary: Comprehensive testing of KK Mortgage CRM - All 21 backend tests passed (100%) and all frontend flows working correctly. Login, Dashboard with KPI cards, Clients CRUD with Export to Excel, Cases, Pipeline, Tasks, Commission, Analytics, Documents, and Export pages all functional.

console_warnings.issue: Chart container dimension warnings - ResponsiveContainer shows negative width(-1) and height(-1)
console_warnings.impact: LOW - Console warnings only, charts still render and function correctly
console_warnings.note: Previous iteration noted minWidth/minHeight=0 was added - warning still appears during initial render but charts work

console_warnings.issue: HTML structure warning - span cannot be child of tbody
console_warnings.impact: LOW - This appears to be Emergent tooling injecting wrapper elements, not actual code issue
console_warnings.note: React hydration warning from tooling wrapper elements, not from source code

backend_api: Dashboard stats endpoint - returns all KPI data
Export clients to Excel (verified xlsx format)
frontend_ui: Login page loads with logo, email, password fields
Login form submission via Enter key
Dashboard with 4 KPI cards (Total Clients, Pipeline Value, Commission, Conversion Rate)
Dashboard secondary stats (Cases, Completed, Lost, Avg Loan, Expiring, Overdue)
Dashboard Monthly Revenue and Pipeline Distribution charts
Clients page list view with client data
Clients page Export to Excel button - triggers download
Clients page Add Client button and dialog form
Commission page with charts and forecast
Analytics page with tabs (Lead Analytics, Revenue, Pipeline, Retention)
Sidebar navigation works for all pages

seed_data_creation: Test used existing seed data - 3 clients visible in dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Previous iteration issues (POST status codes, chart warnings) appear to have been addressed. The chart dimension warnings are console-only and don't affect functionality. The tbody/span warning is from Emergent tooling wrappers, not source code.

verification_status.login_flow: PASS - Email/password login works with Enter key submission
verification_status.dashboard_kpis: PASS - 4 KPI cards with data displayed
verification_status.dashboard_charts: PASS - Charts render despite console warnings
verification_status.analytics_page: PASS - All tabs and table functional
